description: Contact Dead UI Fields & Unused Components. (1) location/timezone always empty (F-10). (2) isOnline/isVIP always false — dead badges (F-11). (3) tags always empty array (F-12). (4) ContactDetail.tsx component unused by page — 597 lines with tests but never imported (F-14). (5) ContactCard.tsx unused by list page (F-28). (6) emailsOpened always 0 (F-20). Decision needed: wire to real data, show placeholder states, or remove dead UI. Audit: docs/audit/contact-detail-wiring-audit.md §16.
notes: Contact audit finding: F-10,F-11,F-12,F-14,F-28,F-20. See docs/audit/contact-detail-wiring-audit.md
